en.extract:
The Alor boobook (Ninox plesseni) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is native to Pantar and Alor Islands in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands.
It was previously considered a subspecies of the Australian boobook, before being reclassified as its own species due to bioacoustic data in 2017.

The '''Alor boobook''' ('''''Ninox plesseni''''') is a species of [[owl]] in the family [[Strigidae]]. It is native to [[Pantar]] and [[Alor Island]]s in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands.<ref name=trainor12>{{cite journal |last1=Trainor |first1= Colin R. |first2= Philippe |last2=Verbelen |first3= Ron E. |last3=Johnstone |title=The avifauna of Alor and Pantar, Lesser Sundas, Indonesia |journal=Forktail |volume=28 |pages=77–92 |url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/230795348}}</ref>

It was previously considered a subspecies of the [[Australian boobook]],<ref>{{Cite web |title=Alor Boobook - eBird |url=https://ebird.org/species/souboo6 |access-date=2023-10-11 |website=ebird.org |language=en}}</ref> before being reclassified as its own species due to bioacoustic data in 2017.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Irham |first1=Mohammad |last2=Ashari |first2=Hidayat |last3=Suparno |last4=Trainor |first4=Colin R. |last5=Verbelen |first5=Philippe |last6=Wu |first6=Meng Yue |last7=Rheindt |first7=Frank E. |date=2019-10-05 |title=A new Myzomela honeyeater (Meliphagidae) from the highlands of Alor Island, Indonesia |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.1007/s10336-019-01722-2 |journal=Journal of Ornithology |volume=161 |issue=1 |pages=313–324 |doi=10.1007/s10336-019-01722-2 |issn=2193-7192|url-access=subscription }}</ref>
